response:
Sec. 1  
peanuts are a type of food that contains proteins which can trigger allergic reactions in some people  
allergic reactions can cause symptoms such as hives or difficulty breathing  
these reactions can be severe and life-threatening in some cases  
people who are allergic to peanuts cannot eat them and need to avoid them in all forms  
the question is about why they can't live underwater  
the reason is related to the physical properties of peanuts and the environment underwater  

Sec. 2  
peanuts are not designed to withstand the conditions of underwater environments  
they are not made to float or stay afloat in water  
the structure of peanuts is not suitable for survival in water  
the biological makeup of peanuts does not allow them to survive in aquatic environments  
the inability to live underwater is a result of their natural composition and not a choice
